description_long: This is a modern, compact SUV with a sleek, aerodynamic body finished in a clean white color. The vehicle features a panoramic sunroof, visible from the top, and has four passenger-accessible doors with flush handles. The front end is characterized by a wide grille and angular headlights, while the rear showcases wraparound taillights and a subtle roof spoiler. The side profile reveals alloy wheels with a multi-spoke design and black trim along the lower edge of the doors. The windows are tinted, and the overall design suggests a recent model from a mainstream manufacturer, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A sleek, white compact SUV with a panoramic sunroof, alloy wheels, and modern styling details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, angular headlights, and a clear windshield with a visible sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, alloy wheels, and the panoramic sunroof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying wraparound taillights, a subtle roof spoiler, and the rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and sunroof.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke alloy wheels with a silver metallic finish
